name: bookswap
description: BookSwap — peer-to-peer book exchange (React + Express + Postgres/Prisma)

scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build: cd server && npm install --include=dev && npx prisma generate && cd ../client && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.start: cd server && npx prisma db push --skip-generate && node src/index.js
